entry.title: Re: How to hide Custom field in Billing Document item bas...
entry.content:
Hi,

unfortunately this functionality is currently not available in billing document apps. It is only possible to not to enable custom fields for displaying in billing UI via app 'Custom Fields'.

You can raise a customer request on our Customer Influence Portal https://www.sap.com/about/customer-involvement/influence-adopt.html.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Cannot access BTP ABAP Trail system from Business Application Studio

entry.title: Report Batch/Bin
entry.content:
Hi,

What is the T-code to issue a stock report by Batch and BIN?

I have been using ZINV2 for stock reporting, but outputs the total balance by the BIN and the ZINVB outputs the balance by BATCH but without BIN...

entry.title: How to determine the correct tax id per each customer based on country
entry.content:
Hi All,

Based on OSS Note https://me.sap.com/notes/0002818042/en , the customer tax ID in S4 hana will be maped to each KNA1-STCD* field based on the last number of the tax ID or for some countries with other logic (Argentina, Germany, etc).

I am creating a development where I need to show the tax id number per each customer in the same field, so I need to be able to determine which STCD* will be used per each country,

Someone know how to determine the correct tax id per each country? 

I cant found a function or program to do that.

Regards,

Ale.

entry.title: Re: Nonconformance Codes in SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content:
Hello @manuel_capretti ,

I normally use ‘Manage Defects’ tile in Fiori. See:

  • https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F2649')/S28OP
  • https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/2bc3ee8d1c83404e8cf62418640004f2/778cc4e03dbd4b8989278b4ff275b744.html

Hope it helps,

Manoel

entry.title: Re: automatically attach outgoing invoices to FI docs
entry.content:
Hi,

please check this community post if this could and fit to your requirement: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/how-to-attach-documents-to-a-journal-entry-within-sap-s-4hana-public-cloud/ba-p/13628451

To fetch a PDF from the outgoing invoice, an ODATA API 'Billing Document - Read, Cancel, GetPDF' is available on SAP API Hub: https://api.sap.com/api/API_BILLING_DOCUMENT_SRV/overview

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Workzone Advanced - My Workspace template
entry.content: Would like to know this too

entry.title: Where can I start learning how to create master data in SAP Process Control?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Discovering the Key Functionalities of SAP Process Control learning journey

Overview
This learning journey helps to understand how to enable enterprises to efficiently manage governance, risk, and compliance (GRC) needs, and streamline compliance management and internal control processes using advanced features and functionalities of SAP Process Control.

Learning objectives
After completing this learning journey, users will be able to create master data in SAP Process Control, including elements such as organizations, business processes, regulations, risks, control objectives, and account groups. Deep dives into the intricacies of control evaluations and discover the power of continuous control monitoring. Additionally, it explains the potential of standard reporting functionality to enhance your compliance and operational efficiency.

Prerequisites

  • Exploring the Principles of SAP Governance, Risk and Compliance in the S/4HANA Public Cloud

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 
Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! 
We are here to support you. I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Deprecation of SuccessFactors Learning Token Server
entry.content: what is the path to get the OAuth 2.0 in SuccessFactors? Any configuration guide or steps to follow this would be helpful. thank you

entry.content:
hello everyone, 

in order to map between Ariba purchase requisition fields and HANA purchase requisition fields, we need to integrate via SCPI. Please, could you please tell us which standard Integration Suite package we can use, if there's any? If there isn't, could you confirm if it must be done in a custom integration?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: Deprecation of SuccessFactors Learning Token Server
entry.content: what is the path to get the OAuth 2.0 in SuccessFactors? Any configuration guide or steps to follow this would be helpful. thank you

entry.title: Old deleted demand (PIRs) is copied again while running MC8G
entry.content:
Hello,

Issue is that we want to delete the old demand by one month (PIRs) by executing MD74, PIRs are getting deleted from MD04 and MD63, but latter when programs RMCP6BIN and RMCP6RES (MC8G) to transfer demand from MC94 to PIRs, all the old demand that has been deleted already by MD74 is also being transferred and PIRs reappearing.

We want to delete old PIRs but also need to transfer demand, how can we make to not transfer the old demand that has been deleted already.

This are the steps we are doing:

Review old PIRs in MD04.

Execute MD74 to delete old PIRs by one month ahead.

Review old PIRs deleted in MD04.

Execute programs RMCP6BIN and RMCP6RES (MC8G) to transfer demand to PIRs.

Review old PIRs deleted in MD04 are reappearing.

 

Please let me know your comments.

Thank you, regards.

entry.title: Re: SAP Activate is Even Better When Using SAP Cloud ALM

entry.title: Authorization control in GTS system with two logical groups (but same LRs) for two feeder systems.
entry.content:
We shall have two feeder ERP systems for GTS Edition for HANA. There would be two logical system groups in GTS for these feeders. Plan is to use same legal regulations for both logical systems. Is it possible to control authorizations to two different sets of end users for respective ERP data ?

In other words, are there authorization controls available at logical system group level ? If not, any other way to control auths despite having same LRs for two ERPs ?

Nic T.

entry.title: Substituir lista de condição de pagamentos SAP Business One.
entry.content:
Seria possível substituir a lista de condição de pagamentos que fica na aba contabilidade de um pedido de compra para listar somente condições ativas?

Criamos um campo definido pelo usuário como Ativo (Sim/Não) para determinar se a condição esta ativa ou não, foi necessário para fazer a integração com nosso Ponto de Venda. 

Porém dentro do Pedido de compra é listado todos as condições, e as vezes o comprador não sabe qual esta ativa ou não.

É possível substituir essa lista por uma consulta formatada onde filtro quais condições estão ativas ?

Obrigado.

entry.title: Re: Wrong TAX calculation in invoice
entry.content: Hello

entry.title: Re: How can I see the requirements of a phantom number?
entry.content:
Hello @leonardohuijon 

You can't see demand on phantom level. That is the nature of phantoms. As per SAP Glossary"

phantom assembly

Material Requirements Planning (PP-MRP)

A logical grouping of components. A phantom assembly is created in engineering to describe a number of components and manage them as a whole. The components in a phantom assembly are immediately placed in the superior assembly. Components in an assembly, on the other hand, are first assembled to produce the header material. Then the header material is placed in the superior assembly. &EXAMPLE& The phantom assembly "set of wheels" contains the components "front wheel" and "rear wheel." The front and rear wheels are immediately placed in the "bicycle" assembly. The "light" assembly contains the materials "bulb" and "reflector." They are first assembled into a lamp. The lamp is then attached to the bicycle.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Report Batch/Bin
entry.content:
Hello @andersonsepol 

No one here can have any idea what your ZINV2 or ZINVB reports are. They are custom made, specific to your implementation only. 

You can't have a stock report on bin level unless you use either LE-WM or EWM. Do you use any of them?

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: SAP BO 4.2 SP05: Windows Server OS Upgrade From 2008 R2 Enterprise to Windows Server 2016.
entry.content:
Hi,

We currently have our BusinessObjects BI server components (4.2 SP05) installed on an on-premise physical Windows Server 2008 R2 Enterprise. We are planning to upgrade the operating system from Windows Server 2008 R2 Enterprise to Windows Server 2016.

I would like to confirm if this OS upgrade can be performed without reinstalling the BusinessObjects application. Additionally, any guidance on the steps required to perform this upgrade would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks,

Kristen

entry.title: Re: STO between a plant that is Automatic Batch Split Val...
entry.content:
Hello @cloud_delict 

Do as the message says and enter a valuation type the STO item details. That's going to be the receiving valuation type. You have to provide one as the material is split valued in the receiving plant 1003.

See the note 2466494 - Error message "Enter valuation type" is displayed in ME21N when creating STO - SAP ERP & SAP S/4HANA

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: How much time does an S4 upgrade generally take?
entry.content: Let us say I am moving from S4 Hana 1909 to S4 Hana 2023. How much time will the Standard, Downtime Optimized process and nZDT take respectively? It depends on Database size  and hardware resources but let us say I have a DB of around 3 TB and optimum hardware resources available.

entry.title: Re: Hello all, I am new here in this community. My goal is to learn SAP with hopes of being a consul
entry.content: Hello, please is there anyone on here that has taken the SAP Certified Associate- SAP S/4HANA System Administrator certification?

entry.title: Not clever but an honest response that won interviewer's heart
entry.content:
In my recent interview with SAP, I was posed with a question that tested my ability to balance family life and professional responsibilities.

The interviewer remarked, "Since you have been married and blessed with a child, you must be busy with family and won't be able to focus on work."

Here’s how I responded, drawing valuable lessons from my personal life that translate seamlessly into my professional environment:

1. Patience:
I shared that my family life taught me the crucial importance of patience. Just as maintaining patience is vital in nurturing relationships with my wife and child, it is equally critical in a professional setting. Patience allows me to navigate challenging situations and sustain positive relationships with my colleagues.

2. Becoming a Great Listener:
Being a good listener is essential in understanding my wife and child better. This skill has immensely benefited my professional interactions as well, enabling me to comprehend my team's perspectives and needs more effectively.

3. Managing Relationships:
Managing a family requires balancing various dynamics, which has honed my ability to manage difficult and dominant teams at work. It has taught me how to navigate different personalities and foster a collaborative environment.

4. Empathy:
Understanding and empathizing with my family's feelings has been crucial at home. This empathy extends to my professional life, allowing me to connect with my team on a deeper level, understanding their challenges and supporting them through difficult times.

5. Give and Take:
The give-and-take dynamic within my family has taught me the importance of mutual respect and trust. In the workplace, this translates into building trust with my colleagues and mentoring them, thus enhancing team capabilities and fostering a growth-oriented environment.

By sharing these insights, I aimed to demonstrate that family life has not only enriched my personal experiences but has also equipped me with skills that are invaluable in the professional realm. These lessons have made me a more effective, empathetic, capable of managing both personal and professional responsibilities successfully.

entry.title: Re: HANA restore delta without log backups
entry.content:
Dear mamartins,

Thank you for your valuable contribution.

Note taken that log backups can bring the database forward to a more recent point-in-time after the full/incremental/differential backup restore, but is not required.

From Recover documentation for HANA database on https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_HANA_PLATFORM/f157e7b47b2a417a99eadd4b6c433b77/6be243b25bfa483ca325c9a37338eddd.html:

Prerequisites to restore:
A data backup or a data snapshot.
Delta backups and/or log backups
The log area

This means log backups are not required for a incremental restore. (only for a point-in-time restore)

I put my DEV/QAS databases in overwrite mode so not to deal with excessive logs, as point-in-time recovery is not needed; but it might be needed to restore to a specific day.

Strange that the HANA studio restore screens does still not provide a easy interface to restore to a certain incremental backup performed on a certain day.  This make recovey situations complex when this backup strategy is enabled.

I see another blog where a "trick" is required to restore to a certain delta backup => https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/hana-database-recovery-trick-to-restore-to-in-between-delta-backups/ba-p/13293013. 

Kind Regards,

entry.title: GPS Validation in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hi friends,

We  creating our first BuildApp project, consisting of a warehouse app. In this project, we have a requirement, in which we need to validate for the following conditions.

1) We need to add a geolocation point for 10 km radius. If the admin is outside the 10 km radius of the warehouse, then an error message needs to be triggered.

2) In the second scenario, we need to trigger an error message in case, the admin is inside 10 km radius of the warehouse.

We have currently fetched the present GPS details using Longitude and Latitude, by using Sensor variables.

In Javascript tool, in the market place, we have added the required logic, but the answer is not coming.

 

The JSP coding is as follows.

<script>
$(document).ready(function() {
$('#getLocation').click(function() {
if (navigator.geolocation) {
navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(success, error);
}
else {
$('#result').text("Geolocation is not supported by this browser.");
}
});

function success(position) {
const latitude = position.coords.latitude;
const longitude = position.coords.longitude;
const geofence = {
lat: 37.7749,
lng: -122.4194,
radius: 10
};

const distance = calculateDistance(latitude, longitude, geofence.lat, geofence.lng);
if (distance <= geofence.radius) {
$('#result').text("You are within the geofenced area.");
} else {
$('#result').text("You are outside the geofenced area.");
}
}

function error() {
$('#result').text("Unable to retrieve your location.");
}

function calculateDistance(lat1, lon1, lat2, lon2) {
const R = 6371e3;
const φ1 = toRadians(lat1);
const φ2 = toRadians(lat2);
const Δφ = toRadians(lat2 - lat1);
const Δλ = toRadians(lon2 - lon1);
const a = Math.sin(Δφ / 2) * Math.sin(Δφ / 2) +
Math.cos(φ1) * Math.cos(φ2) *
Math.sin(Δλ / 2) *
Math.sin(Δλ / 2);
const c = 2 * Math.atan2(Math.sqrt(a),
Math.sqrt(1 - a));
return
R * c;
}

function toRadians(degrees) {
return
degrees * Math.PI / 180;
}
});
</script>

We are unable to get validation on the required fields. Kindly provide your inputs, since we are new to SAP BuildApps.

Regards,

Mehak

entry.title: Re: How can I get full logs of Cloud Foundry
entry.content: [3] SAP Cloud Logging mentioned above can retain the logs for as long as you want (max 90 days currently). You pay for the storage.

Thanks

Ravi

entry.title: Is it possible to do validation in unmanaged RAP without a draft?
entry.content: When I try to create the entry, I get No data found for OData V2 service binding. I got the below error. When I checked the metadata for the service generated, it had the ‘IsActiveEntity’ key field.

entry.title: Re: How to manage obsolete organisational units in learni...
entry.content:
@Sarah_Rothery, we use the Organization Connector to manage our inactive organizations. We use the Organization Type field in the LMS to hold a value of either ACTIVE or INACTIVE. We confirmed the ORG_TYP_ID field was mapped in the Organization Connecter section of our CONNECTOR configuration file in the LMS. Then we used Integration Center to create our organization_data connector file. In the integration center file, we added a calculated field for ORG_TYP_ID that populates a value of ACTIVE or INACTIVE based on the Cost Center status value. Integration Center then uploads the data to our specified connector file location on a scheduled basis. When the org connector runs, it populates the Organization Type field. Our admins can then use Organization Type as a search or report filter.

Like you, we have a long list of org units that are obsolete but still linked to inactive user records, and we have had to make our peace with them. But the Org Type search filter allows our admins to find the active org IDs without wading through all of the junk data.

Good luck!
Mary Katherine Johnson

entry.title: Is there a way to view and modify the specific payment format "61 - SAP COLL PAYORDREQ XML Payment"?
entry.content:
Dear support,

we are in the process to integrate TIS with the UK Bank.
Within this process, we struggle to create a FASTER payment, because the available Payment Method are only:
- Domestic Wire, which will create the CHAPS
- Domestic Bank, which will create the BACS
- International Payment, which will create the INTERNATIONAL

Due to the fact that we are using the Payment Format required for TIS, called "61 - SAP COLL PAYORDREQ XML Payment"

Is there a way to view and modify that specific payment format?

Regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Is there a way to view and modify the specific paymen...
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

First, we need to understand if your bank has requested some modifications to the file structure to comply with their bank-specific software. The system doesn't allow direct editing of the pre-delivered payment formats. 

 

For more details, please check the Help Document and KBA below:

Payment Batches Quick Guide (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_BYDESIGN/2754875d2d2a403f95e58a41a9c7d6de/52f802f28b864baeaa4a13b2bd9b1198.html?locale=en-US)
3146113 - Modify Outbound File Resulting from Standard Payment File Structure https://me.sap.com/notes/3146113
Custom Outbound Bank File Format In SAP ByDesign (https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/custom-outbound-bank-file-format-in-sap-bydesign/ba-p/13556175). 
Best regards,  
Ihan
SAP Product Support
Community:
SAP Business ByDesign:
https://www.sap.com/community/topics/business-bydesign.html

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK - push notifications and other issues
entry.content: During a standard MDK Cloud Build there is a step where you can specify your google-services.json.  On the second step (Platform) when creating the build job you have the option to upload your Google Services JSON file.

entry.title: Re: How to you remove Action links in Adapt UI
entry.content:
On the same topic, do you know how we can remove Cards from an Overview page?

My Sales Overview (F2200) has a few cards that we need to remove, as they are not relevant to our users. If we do Adapt UI and hide those cards, the end-user can just go in Manage Cards and bring them back:

End-users don't have Adapt UI option, but they have Manage Cards which allows them to unhide what has been hidden by the key-user adaptation. 

 

As far as I know, the cards inside an OVP are not controlled by target-mappings. The navigation from cards are, but not the visibility of the cards. Is there a way to remove cards so the users can't bring them back?

Thanks

entry.title: Performance Issue After Converting SAC Stories to Optimized Design Experience
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

I'm sharing an issue we encountered regarding the conversion of SAC stories from the classic design to the optimized design experience.

Tools:

  • BW4HANA  
  • SAP Analytics Cloud (Live Model connection)

 

Issue:

After performing the recommended conversions, we began to notice a decline in performance in the converted stories. Where previously they took only a few seconds to load, the initial load time has now increased significantly.

Has anyone else identified a similar case? Are there known possible causes?

Thank you!

 

SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: Re: Adding Custom Metrics to a CAP application using cap-js/telementry plugin and SAP Cloud Logging
entry.content: To learn more about metrics visualizations with Cloud Logging, read my blog post explaining OpenSearch visualizations in much more detail: https://opensearch.org/blog/opentelemetry-metrics-visualization/. This will enhance your insights even more.

entry.title: Re: SF Incentive Management: Measurements per Classifier
entry.content:
Max - All our "per customer" metrics rely on custom stored procedures as a stage hook.

 

I am not sure what reporting solution you are using, but if you are willing to have additional custom SQL, you can always save the intermediate results in an EXT table to be used in reporting.

 

Assuming this is a primary measurement rule, you can see the credits that were an input in the cs_pmCreditTrace table. This will help keep some of the business logic in commissions and out of custom code.

entry.title: Hello Experts!How to make available a non-flexible real statement workflow on ECC to Fiori?
entry.content: I have a real statement workflow on SAP GUI and i need to make it available on Fiori. Someone can help me?

entry.title: Re: Special Purpose ledger
Re: Anyone know how to highlight a field with color where the current cursor is in SAP screen person
entry.content:
Yes, you can do this - with a couple of caveats.
First, this is not supported natively by Personas, since it requires some DOM manipulation and adding a CSS style sheet, therefore you shouldn't expect any support from SAP if you decide to do it anyway. Second, it is obviously not going to work in the Windows or Java GUI.
Here is a sample script which changes the border color of the field to red where the focus is currently on. If you desire some different highlighting, then you'd need to change the script accordingly.
You can save this as a global script, and then you'd need to run it once in a session via the onLoad event or a script. Then, during that browser session it will be effective. If you want to disable the highlighting, you'd need to remove the style sheet added by the script.

 

function createStyle(styles, id) {
    if (document.getElementById(id)) {
        // Style element exists - create it only once
        return;
    }
    var style = document.createElement('style');
    style.id = id;
    style.type = 'text/css';
 
    if (style.styleSheet) {
        style.styleSheet.cssText = styles;
    }else{
        style.appendChild(document.createTextNode(styles));
        document.getElementsByTagName("head")[0].appendChild(style);
    }
}

var styles = '.lsForm .lsField--focus:is(.lsField--standalone) { border: 3px solid red; }';
createStyle(styles, 'custom-style-red-focus');

entry.title: Formula that reads multiple records
entry.content:
I’m looking for a formula that can read through multiple records and identify the earliest (minimum) future schedule appointment date in a specific department or indicate there is no future appointment.   

  • Appointment Date > Today
  • Appointment Status = Scheduled
  • Department = Dental

I have tried a formula that evaluates each line and returns either totext({APPT.APPT_TIME}) or "00 No future appt" then grouping and sorting to return the earliest future appointment but this is very clunky and not always returning the correct values.

Is there a better way to do this?

entry.title: Re: Anyone know how to highlight a field with color where...
entry.content:
Thanks Tamas.

Do you mind guiding me on how to do that?

entry.title: How it works flag NOT IF FAILED from process type Check if Previous Run of the Chain is Still Active
entry.content:
I'm trying to understand how the process typ Check if Previous Run of the Chain is Still Active works.

I Have understand how the options Previous run must be finished since and Wait for the previous run to finish for works, but I haven't understand how to use/work the flag Not if failed.  According to SAP documentation Not if failed,  you can stipulate that previous runs that failed count as inactive (option 1) immediately. 

I understand option 1 is inactive, option 2 active and option 3 failed

My process event is configure as follows

Intentionally, the last run of the process chain end it in red, so I assumed that the next run, with the flag Not if failed set, will take option 1 but it doesn't, it keeps taking option 3.  Any clues?

 

 

 

Thank you all, Oscar

entry.title: Re: How to replace expired condition contract with an active condition contract?
entry.content:
Hi @Sagar1991, 

I've seen your inbox message but answering here for sharing with others. 

Before checking BADI, I would recommend to check your pricing type used from the copy control and/or the condition class used for the accrual condition in the Billing document pricing procedure. 
I guess the accrual is not redetermined in the return because of the copy control, and the system will capture as is the condition record determined at the time of the billing document 2 years ago. 

Haven't tested and not sure if it will work for a return in reference to a billing document but you can as well check to create a requirement routine in copy of 67 - which I believe you're using in the billing doc pricing procedure for accrual in case you have have multiple relevant value - and add a check for the contract to be active. 

Last resource would be to use BADI, but from my point of view the first recommendation should help you. 

Regards, 
Gauthier Victor

entry.title: STS configuration for BOBJ BI launchpad 4.3
entry.content:
Process Overview

Pre-requisites:

  1. Ensure that the following parameters are enabled on the SAP Entitlement system (BW System) (RZ11): login/accept_sso2_ticket=1 , login/create_sso2_ticket=2
  2. Access to SAP Entitlement system (such as BW) either directly or through your SAP BASIS contact.
  3. Get the SAP Entitlement system details (BW system) such as hostname, Instance number, Logical system name, Username and Password from customer/Basis to add it in BOBJ.

Perform the below steps to configure Security Token Service (STS):

  1. Creating/Testing a connection to BW system from BI. 
  2. Adding SAP Entitlement System (BW system) to BI.
  3. Creating the certificates in the BI Platform to enable the trust between BI and BW system.

1. Creating/Testing a connection to BW system from BI Platform. 

Before configuring STS, we need to validate that an OLAP connection to a SAP Entitlement system works by providing credentials manually to rule out any non-STS/SSO related issues.

Login to BI system using below URL:
http://<hostname>:<port>/BOE/CMC
From CMC Home --> OLAP Connections --> Create/edit the connection --> provide SAP Entitlement system details --> connect.
When you click on "Connect" you're prompted for Username and Password of an SAP account that has access to the data in the SAP Entitlement system. Provide those credentials and click OK


The connection is successful if you are shown a list of cubes on the SAP Entitlement system. Click OK to exit this window.

2. Adding SAP Entitlement System (BW system) to BI.

Navigate to CMC Home --> Authentication --> SAP --> Add the SAP Entitlement system details (BW System) --> Update.

 

Import the roles in the Role tab which are given by customer or maintain the roles as per source system and update it.

Go to the User Update tab and update the user and groups.

We can validate the above settings by navigating to CMC Home --> User and Groups. The system details will be reflecting in the format of <SID>~<Client>@<Imported Role>.

3. Creating the certificates in the BI Platform to enable the trust between BI and BW system.

3.1 Creating certificates in BI system of Windows Server:

Login to the BI Target system and open command prompt and navigate to the folder where keytool is installed. 
Windows Default Directory  : <INSTALLDIR>\SAP BusinessObjects Enterprise XI4.0\win64_x64\sapjvm\bin

Linux Default Directory: <INSTALLDIR>/sap_bobj/enterprise_xi40/<UNIX-base>/sapjvm/bin
Ex: D:/Program Files (x86)/SAP BusinessObjects/SAP BusinessObjects Enterprise XI 4.0/win64_x64/sapjvm/bin

Execute the below commands to generate pkcs12 certificate. Replace the Alias name and password in the below commands. When the below command is finished, a new file is created in the SAPJVM bin directory called "keystore.p12" 

keytool -genkey -alias <ALIAS> -keystore keystore.p12 -storepass <PASSWORD> -dname CN=<ALIAS> -validity 365 -keyalg DSA -keysize 1024 -storetype pkcs12

Execute the below commands to generate cert.der. When the command is finished, a new file is created in the SAPJVM bin directory called "cert.der".

keytool -exportcert -keystore keystore.p12 -storetype pkcs12 -file cert.der -alias <ALIAS>

Now upload the keystore.p12 file in BI launchpad and upload cert.der in BW system to establish trust.

Login to BW system --> enter Tcode STRUSTSSO2 --> Import the certificate.

 

Connect with BW team to do validation.

Conclusion

The above steps complete the STS configuration in BOBJ BI Launchpad. Please refer the below KBA for entire solution

2781286 - How To: Configure Security Token Service (STS) communication on BI 4.2, BI 4.3 and above

entry.title: How to enable mixed mode for Azure native services via Azure Application Gateway
entry.content:
Introduction

Usually, an Azure service can be consumed from SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) via a SAP Private Link endpoint, ensuring secure and private connectivity. However, this is not always possible.
In such case, the public endpoint of the Azure service must be used.
Unfortunately, Azure does not guarantee a static public IP for most of its native services.
One way to work around this limitation is by using Azure Application Gateway as a proxy.
Here follows a detailed description on how to configure Azure Application Gateway with a public static IP in front of an Azure service.

Prerequisites

  1. We need a public FQDN that will resolve to the public IP of Azure Application Gateway. This can be achieved by registering a subdomain in a DNS server that you have control of or by using one of the cheap subdomain hosting services. In our configuration we will use the subdomain pubazuresvc.example.com.

  2. A TLS certificate for that same subdomain pubazuresvc.example.com is needed - use one of the CA authorities on the market. The certificate has to be in pfx format.

Overveiw

Lets take as an example Apache Kafka endpoint on Azure that has a public hostname publickafka.servicebus.windows.net and listens on TCP port 9093.
Lets assume that we face the problem described above and DNS name publickafka.servicebus.windows.net cannot be resolved from within BTP.
We are going to build a workaround by using Azure Application Gateway and its newly released layer 4 features.
Azure Applicate Gateway will be configured with a public static IP address and it will serve as a TLS proxy for the Apache Kafka endpoint.

Fig. 1 Architecture Overview

Configure and deploy Azure Application Gateway

Lets create and configure the Application Gateway. We will follow similar steps as described in this tutorial, using the following configuration values:

  1. Basic tab: no difference with the tutorial

  2. Frontends tab: configure a public static IP, and take note of the IP as it must be assigned to the hostname pubazuresvc.example.com

  3. Backends tab: add backend pool with Target Type: IP address or FQDN and target value set to the hostname of the Kafka endpoint publickafka.servicebus.windows.net

  4. Configuration tab: add a routing rule

  5. Configure listener with values:

    • Protocol: TLS
    • Port: 9093
    • in Tls Settings choose Upload a certificate and select the TLS certificated you have created for pubazuresvc.example.com
    • Listener type: basic 
       

  6. Backend targets tab: select the backend pool created on step 3.

  7. Add a new Backend settings with values:

    • Backend protocol: TLS
    • Backend port: 9093
    • Backend server’s certificate is issued by a well-known CA: Yes
    • SNI: servicebus.windows.net 
       

  8. Finish the rest of the creation wizard and deploy the Application Gateway

  9. Configure your DNS server so that hostname pubazuresvc.example.com will be resolved with the public ip of the Application Gateway

After deploying the above configuration, you can connect to the Apache Kafka service using the hostname pubazuresvc.example.com and port 9093.

entry.title: Re: Anyone know how to highlight a field with color where...
entry.content: Thanks Tamas. That helps

entry.title: Configuring the SuccessFactors Employee Central > Advance Types and Deductions
entry.content:
In this Blog, let me share the interested basic functionality of the SuccessFactors Employee Central – Advance & Deduction, like how to configure the eligibility, workflow, business rules and assign the same into the Objects. The idea here is to enlighten this product features into our community and start use and talk with Customers (during the explore and realization phases in the implementation project or any rollout projects).

This is one of the best practices instead of mashup the loan infotype in SuccessFactors Employee Central and replicate the pay component data into S/4 Hana Payroll or SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll.

Manage Advance Objects Overview:

The following are the key objects in Advance.

  1. Accumulation for Advance
  2. Advance Data Retention Configuration Group
  3. Eligibility For Advances
  4. Non-Recurring Payment

Business Requirements:

The below the customer requirement towards the Advance.

Note: The business rule is having more capabilities to with combinations to set the eligibility and amounts e.g., few samples ask from customers are Based on Grade, Based on Company, Multiply of Basic Salary (two times of basic e.g.), Maximum Eligibility Amounts etc. I have taken the example of Employee Basic Salary Amount.

Configuration Steps (Including the Business Rule, Eligibility Rule and Assign it to the Objects)

Section 1: Goto Manage Advance Objects > In Create New > Configure the Eligibility for Advance

 

The following highlights are key for the configuration completion.

  • Eligibility ID
  • Eligibility Rule
  • Advance Type
  • Legal Entity
  • Maximum Eligible Amount (If needed)
  • Currency
  • Number of Instalments (This will be displayed as a default number in the User’s Screen)
  • Recovery Pay Components (Select the relevant Pay Component to deduct the respective advance, this will be used to create the deductions automatically for the users who avail the advances)
  • Interest (If you want to charge with Interest or without interest from employee)
  • Other Mandatory Fields

 

Note: Configure the Eligibility Rule and Deduction Pay Components (Prior to Configure the Eligibility for Advance)

Configure the Eligibility Rule:

Configure the Deduction Pay Component;

 

Section 2:  Configure the Workflow (There two level of approval been enabled in the workflow)

Note: As per your requirements, you can define the workflow and write the business rule accordingly as well.

Section 3:  Assign the Workflow and Business Rule into the Object

Goto the Configure Object Definition > non-Recuring Payment > Assign it into the Save Rule

Section 4:  Role Based Permissions

 

Note: If is defined under Secured, then select the Non-Recurring Payments access respectively or else it is not required to do.

Section 5:  Configure into the People Profile

Configure the Advances Portlets in People Profile as per the below screen shot.

 

Section 6:  User Experience (Look and Feel by the Users)

Based on the eligibility rule and criteria, user (here Admin in our case) will see the respective Advance Type in the Employee’s /People Profile

Click on the “Request Now” Let us create the request and see the process/test the case.

Finally, let us see the approver page user experience.

 

Once approved (two levels in our case), the respective record will be created in the people profile as below.

Current Advance Details

 Advance Eligibility, since it is fully consumed there is no balance.

 

Deductions also created automatically based on the configuration (effective date to deduct the instalments.

Note: In the next blog, let us see, how to automate the Advance into One Time Payment.

I believe that the above discussed steps will add more values to your projects and help explore further on the subjected topic.

Thanks for reading my blog and share your views / feedback.

Regards,

Anba (Anbazhagan Natarajan)

entry.title: Re: SSL error while connecting web service using SOAP in SAP CPI
entry.content: Hello , did you ever figure out the issue

entry.title: Flexible Workflow Purchase requisition my inbox - approve error
entry.content:
Hello,

I've a flexible workflow for Purchase Requisition have an issue in my inbox.

When approving (clicking on Approve button) the PR in my inbox (logged as CC Manager) is giving the error:  "Cannot process task. For more information, see the details.
RFC call was not successful because of communication failure 'An exception with the type CX_SY_REF_IS_INITIAL was raised, but was not handled locally or declared in a RAISING clause." 

This issue has occurred after 2023 S4HANA upgrade.

Please let me know how to resolve this issue, thanks

VJoseph

entry.title: Info record is still picking up price from expired outline agreement
entry.content:
We have stopped using and maintaining outline agreements a few years ago.

The outline agreements are all expired but I still have a couple of vendors that when I assign material to them and process requisitions, the info record is still picking up price from expired outline agreement instead of the most recent purchase order price. I always have to pull up the most recent order and update the PO price manually before issuing it out. I even deleted all the lines in the expired outline agreement but that didn't change anything at all.

I already submitted a ticket to our IT department. They're suggesting that I use T-code ME12 to change the value for the info record. Aside from this being tedious having to update 100 info records one at a time, I'm more interested on what's causing the info record to keep picking up expired OA price for these two specific vendors

entry.title: Re: How to Enable or Configure Salesforce Adapter Type in Trial Account for Cloud Integration?
entry.content:
Hi,

It needs to be downloaded and deployed from Software Center/discover tab in CPI.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 
I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to express my keen interest in transitioning to a career in SAP FICO and to seek your guidance on how best to achieve this goal.
With over 12 years of experience in the banking sector, I have developed a strong foundation in financial analysis, accounting, and regulatory compliance. My roles have equipped me with a deep understanding of financial processes and operational workflows, which I believe are directly transferable to a career in SAP FICO.
I am particularly drawn to SAP FICO because of its critical role in financial management and its growing demand across various industries. I am eager to leverage my banking expertise to provide value-added solutions in the SAP landscape.
wahab khan

Hi Team,

I am have added few fields in BUT000 Table.

Created the Resultant artifacts with the structures and Apply selected. I can see BUT000_PRC and BUT000_SRC

When I try uploading the data using file consolidation, Table BUT000 is not getting updated with this field.

I there any other step I have to preform ?. 

Could you pleas help.

entry.title: Re: Trigger a Counter based Maintenance Plan based on Usa...
entry.content:
Yes, I have added (many) Measurement Documents for the Measurement Point linked to the Maintenance Plan using IK11.

When using a Maintenance Plan with a Measurement Point (Counter) assigned, you cannot enter a Start of Cycle. The "driver" for the Maintenance Plan is the Measurement Point (Counter).

entry.title: How to set job for change price determination?
entry.content:
We would like to set Job for APP change price determination.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to set job for change price determination?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,


In order to set a job to Change Price Determination (CKMM), you can go to app "Schedule Inventory Accounting Jobs" and select template Change Material Price Determination, you can use F1 help for guidance. In step 3 you can select the parameters. 

Schedule Inventory Accounting Jobs

Change Price Determination


Best Regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Duplicate ID error while working with Adaptation project
entry.content: I have extended a standard Fiori application using Adaptation project. I extended the view and added a new section(fragment) and deployed to FLP.   How to avoid/clear duplicate ID error while navigating back from FLP and getting back into the app?

entry.title: BAPI_PO_CHANGE
entry.content:
Hello friends, I want to change the LOEKZ field in EKPO as seen in the codes below. However, although BAPI returns a success message, LOEKZ does not change. Why could it be ? I add my code below .

 

       LOOP AT lt_wf_td_003 INTO ls_wf_td_003.
          APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_poitem ASSIGNING <fs_poitem>.
          <fs_poitem>-po_item    = ls_wf_td_003-ebelp.
          <fs_poitem>-delete_ind = abap_false.

          APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_poitemx ASSIGNING <fs_poitemx>.
          <fs_poitemx>-po_item    = ls_wf_td_003-ebelp.
          <fs_poitemx>-po_itemx   = abap_true .
          <fs_poitemx>-delete_ind = abap_true.

          UNASSIGN: <fs_poitem>,<fs_poitemx>.
        ENDLOOP.

        " Call BAPI To Update PO With Items Table
        CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_PO_CHANGE'
          EXPORTING
            purchaseorder = iv_doc_number+0(10)
          TABLES
            return        = lt_return_po
            poitem        = lt_poitem
            poitemx       = lt_poitemx.

        LOOP AT lt_return_po TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS WHERE type CA 'EAX'.
          EXIT.
        ENDLOOP.
        IF sy-subrc NE 0. " No Error
          CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT'
            EXPORTING
              wait = 'X'.
       ENDIF.

entry.title: Re: Third-Party Cookies and SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content: Hi @p_m - We are aware of this development. For the moment, I believe it means that SAC will continue to work as-is without further action required by customers. However, we will need to get clarity on Google's plan to "introduce a new experience in Chrome that lets people make an informed choice that applies across their web browsing" (per A new path for Privacy Sandbox on the web). I plan to update this blog once more details are available.

entry.title: BAPI_SALES_ORDER_CHANGE issues removing delivery block
entry.content:
Hi Friends,

I've been encountering issues when trying to use BAPI_SALES_ORDER_CHANGE to remove delivery block. Here's the issues I'm getting:

-When trying to change 2 sales orders, 1st one gets posted successfully while second throws an error saying "Sales document is still being process by (same user)

- When trying to change 4 sales orders, I get a random change of vbuk-uvals to value 'B' which means partially processed then on the latter part of the program, delivery fails...

Can you please help if there's any missing parameters that I need to add? or if I'm missing anything. I attached my code below: 

 

loop at lt_salesorder_change assigning <lfs_salesorder_change>.

            lwa_orderheader_in-dlv_block = ''.
            lwa_orderheader_inx-updateflag = c_update_flag.
            lwa_orderheader_inx-dlv_block = c_flag.

            call function 'BAPI_SALESORDER_CHANGE'
              exporting
                salesdocument    = <lfs_salesorder_change>-vbeln
                order_header_in  = lwa_orderheader_in
                order_header_inx = lwa_orderheader_inx
              tables
                return           = lt_chg_return.

            read table lt_chg_return into lwa_chg_return with key type = c_error.
            if sy-subrc EQ 0.
              call function 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_ROLLBACK'.
            else.
              call function 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT'
                exporting
                  wait   = abap_on
                importing
                  return = lwa_commit_return.
            endif.  

      endloop.

 

 Thanks,

Geoff

entry.title: Creating an L3-L8 Approval Hierarchy
entry.content:
Hi,

We would like to add more management levels to our workflow approvals. However, with SuccessFactors not having an organizational hierarchy automatically saved, it's been difficult finding a way to expand our workflow approval list. I have looked into the option if using the Custom Manager in the Approver Type list, but I was only able to add one level. We currently created a dynamic role for our L2 leaders and this list is easy to maintain because it's a 1:1 relationship with employee assigned Function. Unfortunately, our L3-L8 doesn't have a 1:1 relationship with any employee attributes. 

Are there any other customers that have successfully built a workflow approval list of this type and if yes, does it require a lot of maintenance and how did you configure it?

Thanks in advance!
Annie

entry.title: Hi, Can restrict portlet edit access using business rule
entry.content:
There are two custom MDF portlets - GMC & Dependent

I want to restrict dependent portlet

The dependent portlet itself needs to create a start date and end date, once these dates are initiated by ABC group, that particular period only employees have access to Dependent portlet edit access.

Note : ABC group people only have initiating start date and end date access, filed should not visible to others.

Under GMC portlet, there is field GMC coverage - if yes then Emp have access only can add 3 Dependent if not only 2 dependent access. like Add dependent child associates need to be restrict.

entry.title: SAP's Collaboration with Microsoft and Wipro to Provide Near-Zero Cost RISE Migration Offering
entry.content:
As more and more customers embark on digital transformation journeys, SAP and its best-in-class ecosystem continue to support organizations in achieving a future state IT operating model, driving innovation, and creating competitive advantage.

The newest collaboration between SAP, Wipro, and Microsoft has been designed to help customers adapt their IT Operating Model, transitioning from their SAP on-premise deployments to a cloud delivered enterprise IT estate, via RISE with SAP. The combined expertise of SAP, Wipro, and Microsoft will provide customers a simpler and more economically viable option to help them reimagine their business models, streamline operations, and deliver superior customer experiences.

"We are excited to be able to bring our customers the benefits of this three-way collaboration between Wipro, SAP and Microsoft", said Srinivas Sai N., VP and SAP Global Practice Head at Wipro. "By leveraging our industry expertise and digital capabilities, coupled with the know-how of SAP and Microsoft, together we will be able to accelerate our customers’ journeys as intelligent enterprises and help them achieve sustainable growth."

Together, the three partners aim to provide customers with clarity and a prescriptive and harmonized set of recommendations, leveraging each party’s best practices, to harness the full potential of RISE with SAP to fuel innovation, drive growth, and thrive in the digital economy.

Microsoft will provide the robust cloud infrastructure necessary to support the scalability, security, and performance requirements of RISE with SAP deployments whilst Wipro will leverage its extensive expertise in digital transformation and industry-specific solutions to drive the adoption of RISE with SAP, whilst all three will all offer financial incentives to help customers migrate to RISE in a cost-effective manner.

"We are proud to work with SAP and Wipro to support accelerated RISE with SAP deployments," said Silvio Bessa, Global SAP Practice Leader at Microsoft. "Microsoft Cloud is a scalable secure solution to provide the performance needed for successful digital transformations and tangible differentiation value to customers."

RISE with SAP is a comprehensive offering which helps to manage the change and risk associated with an organization’s transition from SAP S/4HANA to SAP S/4 HANA Cloud, combining the power of SAP's industry-leading software with business process redesign services, infrastructure, and best-in-class partners to deliver tangible business outcomes. 

David Robinson, President Cloud ERP – RISE with SAP adds, “We are pleased to bring the partner ecosystem into the RISE transformation to simplify our customer’s journey to the cloud to modernize their legacy ERP. We encourage our customers who are in a position to benefit from this partnership to connect with their account teams, and we look forward to accelerating many more transformation journeys in the months ahead.”

For more information about RISE with SAP and the partnership with Wipro and Microsoft's Cloud Solutions, please visit the following:

  • RISE with SAP
  • Wipro Practice Page
  • SAP on the Microsoft Cloud – SAP Cloud Platform | Microsoft Azure

entry.title: Re: Story Reporting: Unable to find fields in available data
entry.content: Hi, wondering if anyone has been able to locate the Level in Org field in Story reporting? I can find Direct Reports but am currently hunting for Level in Org.

entry.title: Re: 1EG - Bank Integration with File Interface
entry.content: I'm not sure if a middleware, because reading the documentation in the best practices page there isn't an API to get the information in 1EG. Maybe using a RPA you can download the file, but I'm not sure if that is the best approach when the scenario 2YM has API. https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/2ym-bank-connectivity-via-api/qaq-p/12349823

entry.title: Re: MDK 401 response
entry.content: The error message indicates a problem for the use to retrieve the metadata for the backend service.  Could the user be locked out of the backend for some reason or is the new metadata using a different / new service that the user might not have access to?

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to do validation in unmanaged RAP with...
entry.content:
https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_cp_index_htm/CLOUD/en-US/abenbdl_validations.htm

Availability

  • Managed RAP BOs
  • Unmanaged and draft-enabled RAP BOs.

    Caution: Not available for unmanaged, non-draft RAP BOs.

entry.title: Re: How to Master Planning strategies in SAP PP Demand Management?
entry.content:
Hi azeem,

There are plenty of blogs and community posts you can find regarding this topic, you can start by learning the most common for MTS(10,40) and MTO (20,50).

Here are few posts that I could easily find for you.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/overview-of-sap-planning-strategy/ba-p/13243148

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/planning-strategy-10-vs-planning-strategy-30-in-mts/ba-p/13281510

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/make-to-order-strategies-strategy-20/ba-p/13253776

Regards.

Alejandro Peña

entry.title: Re: SUB BOM AND MRP CALCULATION
entry.content:
Hi,

MRP does not use Production Time in BOM for calculations, then you have to set lead time for B (2 days) & C (3 days) in Item Master Data >>> Planning Tab, then run MRP again.

Hope this helps,

Son Tran

entry.title: Re: confirmed quantity still exists after goods issue
entry.content:
Hi TimoGn,

Goods Issue qty from MIGO (261) is different from confirmed qty, confirmed qty will be updated on your operation details only after doing a production confirmation, either by CO11N or CO15.

Please check if you have already confirmed your order by checking order status or CO14.

Regards.

entry.title: BYD: How to create warehouse task (or warehouse request) by Webservice?
entry.content:
If there is a web service that generates warehouse tasks based on an incoming delivery notification. Currently, generate warehouse tasks could use automatic actions by "create warehouse request" from UI side.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: BYD: How to create warehouse task (or warehouse reque...
entry.content: Warehouse Request can only be created from UI end, cannot be created though webservice. Currently, you can only create Inbound Delivery Notification via API service, neither to create warehouse request nor warehouse task.
